critic_raw:
Enterprise search model — single pass:

NDCG@10 with specialist-reviewed labels is a strong offline metric. 11% improvement over BM25 is meaningful. But for the stated goal (ticket deflection), three gaps make this evaluation insufficient for the deployment decision:

1. NDCG@10 ≠ ticket deflection. The product context documents specific ways users view good articles and still open tickets.
2. No session-level ticket deflection data — the path from relevance to resolution is assumed, not measured.
3. No query-mix analysis — the improvements may be concentrated in queries with low deflection value.

Verdict: critique_wins
adjudication_raw: Baseline run 2. All three must-find issues. Verdict: critique_wins.
